rule: Every forced route or action failure condition must expose a domain-specific recovery path and complete the original intent after recovery.

actionResults.expectedResult: Show immediate action-specific progress and then complete the original end intent.
actionResults.observedResult: Progress appeared immediately and the original action completed.

actionResults.expectedResult: Explain the offline interruption, preserve state, support Cancel and complete Retry.
actionResults.observedResult: Cancel preserved context and Retry completed the exact original action.

actionResults.observedResult: Cancel preserved context and Retry completed the exact original action.
